title: Use PDFs in Information Extraction and Custom LLM (Beta)
body:
Information Extraction and Custom LLM have a UI workflow to convert PDFs to Markdown and store the results in a table. Users can then use the resulting table as input in Information Extraction and Custom LLM.

See Use PDFs for [Information Extraction](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/key-info-extraction#pdf) and [Custom LLM](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/custom-llm#pdf).
